action_set_definitions.name: get_clinical_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environmental state including patient vitals, disease severity, toxicity levels, and treatment history.

action_set_definitions.name: identify_target_tooth
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a visual and physical examination of a specific oral region to identify the exact tooth ID causing symptoms.

action_set_definitions.name: conduct_diagnostics
action_set_definitions.description: Performs specific diagnostic tests on a tooth to determine vitality or morphology.

tooth_id.description: The unique identifier for the tooth.

test_type.description: The type of diagnostic test to run.

action_set_definitions.name: administer_treatment
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a specific clinical procedure on the target tooth.

tooth_id.description: The unique identifier for the tooth.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_biological_clock
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates the passage of time required for biological healing and tissue reattachment.

days.description: Number of days to advance (e.g., 28 for a 4-week healing cycle).

state_description.patient_vitals: Current physiological indicators including heart rate, blood pressure, and oxygen saturation.
state_description.disease_severity_index: A normalized score (0.0 to 1.0) representing the progression of the condition being treated.
state_description.toxicity_level: Accumulated side effects or systemic toxicity from previous treatments (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.treatment_history: A chronological list of actions previously performed on the patient.
state_description.current_step: The current time step or day in the treatment sequence.
state_description.patient_status: The general clinical status of the patient (e.g., 'stable', 'deteriorating', 'critical').

patient_vitals.chief_complaint: Swelling and pain in the back left of the mouth.
